stem:
Which of the following functions has(have) a minimum value at −3 ?

I. f(x) = −6(3)ˣ − 3
II. g(x) = −3(6)ˣ
explanation: Both functions have a negative coefficient in front of a base greater than 1, so each is a decreasing exponential. A decreasing exponential keeps dropping without ever reaching a lowest value, so neither function has a minimum.
